name: control_roku
description: Control a family member's Roku TV through the RokuPi bridge. Use this to diagnose and fix common TV problems remotely: check whether the TV is reachable, see what app is running, navigate menus, launch apps, and recover a stuck TV. All actions are non-destructive — you cannot make purchases, change accounts, delete apps, or factory reset. When a situation is ambiguous, confirm with the user before taking a major action rather than guessing.

action.description: What to do. 'health' checks if the Roku is reachable. 'active_app' returns the currently running app. 'list_apps' lists installed apps. 'press_key' sends one remote button (requires 'key'). 'open_app' launches a known app by friendly name (requires 'app_name'). 'launch_app' launches by numeric Roku channel id (requires 'app_id'). 'reset_home' double-presses Home to recover a stuck TV.

key.description: Remote button for action 'press_key'. One press per call.

app_id.description: Numeric Roku channel id for action 'launch_app' (e.g. '12' for Netflix). Use 'list_apps' first to find ids.
